title: Marathon Digital Holdings Statistics 2026: Bitcoin Holdings and Strategic Metrics
text: Marathon Digital maintained its position as a major Bitcoin treasury company while executing strategic transformation into AI infrastructure. Bitcoin Holdings: MARA held 35,303 bitcoin by end of Q1 2026, worth approximately $2.4 billion based on Bitcoin prices at that time. The company's holdings made MARA one of the largest corporate Bitcoin holders globally. Treasury Strategy: The company maintained a strategic HODL position while selectively monetizing Bitcoin to fund strategic initiatives including the $1.5B Long Ridge Energy acquisition and debt retirement. Bitcoin Reserve Asset: Management increasingly treated Bitcoin as a strategic reserve asset rather than a commodity to be continuously sold for operational funding. Liquid Assets: By late 2025, MARA had assembled over $7 billion in liquid assets including Bitcoin holdings and cash. Capital Flexibility: The substantial Bitcoin holdings and cash position provided management with significant optionality to fund strategic growth initiatives including partnerships with Starwood and expansion of AI infrastructure. Shareholding Value: Bitcoin holdings represented a substantial portion of shareholder value, with market recognition of MARA's role as a Bitcoin treasury company. Forward Outlook: Management's strategic view was that Bitcoin appreciation and AI infrastructure revenue growth would both contribute to future shareholder value creation.
